overview: Medical Institute of Healthy Aging specializes in personalized preventive medicine using advanced diagnostics to track biological aging. They create customized treatment plans focused on health optimization and disease prevention.
highlights: Advanced biological age, brain, arterial, and lung age testing
IV therapies including NAD+, glutathione, and autologous stem cell treatments
Peptide therapies and virtual hormone restoration program
targetAudience: Individuals seeking proactive disease prevention and longevity optimization through personalized, data-driven health strategies.
